topics.title: Python beyond scripts
topics.summary: Turn scripts into maintainable, testable modules.
topics.speechText: Python beyond scripts. Turn scripts into maintainable, testable modules.

topics.title: Git and GitHub
topics.summary: Use history, branches, pull requests, and continuous integration deliberately.
topics.speechText: Git and GitHub. Learn reliable collaboration and evidence of work.

topics.title: APIs
topics.summary: Design reliable HTTP contracts and build a service.
topics.speechText: APIs. Design reliable contracts and build a service.

topics.title: Structured outputs and tool calling
topics.summary: Make model behavior typed, inspectable, and bounded.

starterAction.title: Write a typed tool contract
starterAction.description: Choose one model tool call and define its input fields, output fields, one validation rule, and the safe failure response.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Write a typed tool contract. Choose one model tool call and define its input fields, output fields, one validation rule, and the safe failure response.

topics.title: SQL
topics.summary: Model and query persistent relational data.
topics.speechText: SQL. Model and query persistent relational data.

starterAction.title: Plan a safe first deployment
starterAction.description: Choose one app and list its deployment command, environment values, health check, and rollback signal.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Plan a safe first deployment for one app. Name its deployment command, environment values, health check, and rollback signal.

starterAction.title: Write a one-container plan
starterAction.description: Choose one app and list its command, port, environment values, and one file that must not enter the image.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Write a one-container plan for one app. Name its command, port, environment values, and a file that must not enter the image.

starterAction.title: Define one ownership rule
starterAction.description: Choose one resource and write who may create, read, update, and delete it, plus how the server will enforce that rule.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Define one ownership rule. Choose one resource and write who may create, read, update, and delete it, plus how the server will enforce that rule.

topics.title: Testing
topics.summary: Build confidence with layered automated checks.

topics.title: Logging and monitoring
topics.summary: Observe behavior without leaking private data.

starterAction.title: Design one safe request log
starterAction.description: Choose one endpoint and list its request ID, useful event fields, one alert condition, and fields that must never be logged.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Design one safe request log. Choose one endpoint and list its request ID, useful event fields, one alert condition, and fields that must never be logged.

starterAction.title: Create a five-case evaluation set
starterAction.description: Pick one model task and write five representative inputs, expected qualities, and one failure that must block release.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Create a five-case evaluation set. Pick one model task and write five representative inputs, expected qualities, and one failure that must block release.

topics.title: Retrieval-augmented generation
topics.summary: Ground answers in retrieved, attributable information.

starterAction.title: Trace one grounded answer
starterAction.description: Choose one user question and define the source chunks, citation format, retrieval limit, and behavior when evidence is missing.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Trace one grounded answer. Choose one user question and define the source chunks, citation format, retrieval limit, and behavior when evidence is missing.

topics.title: Asynchronous jobs and queues
topics.summary: Move slow work out of request handling safely.

starterAction.title: Move one slow task to a job
starterAction.description: Choose one request-time task and define the queued payload, retry rule, idempotency key, and user-visible status.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Move one slow task to a job. Choose one request-time task and define the queued payload, retry rule, idempotency key, and user-visible status.

topics.title: Basic software architecture
topics.summary: Design small, understandable boundaries and dependencies.

starterAction.title: Draw three system boundaries
starterAction.description: Choose one small app and name its interface, application, and infrastructure responsibilities with one dependency direction.
starterAction.speechText: Starter action. Draw three system boundaries. Choose one small app and name its interface, application, and infrastructure responsibilities with one dependency direction.
